query:
CREATE TABLE `projects` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`clientId` int,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`status` enum('active','on_hold','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`startDate` bigint,
	`dueDate` bigint,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `projects_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user j5qKiZUYQMRfMo2.b7f9ad3c878a --database gYJ9uUE9i5ygur2GefRATd --execute CREATE TABLE `projects` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`clientId` int,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`status` enum('active','on_hold','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`startDate` bigint,
	`dueDate` bigint,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `projects_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
